rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The local status.json file may lag behind GitHub label state if the pipeline writes to GitHub before updating status.json — always use status.json to determine what SHOULD be present, and gh issue vie","scope":".kody/tasks/2516-260418-040123/label-progression.test.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Lifecycle labels are mutually exclusive per stage (kody:planning, kody:building, etc.) — assert the current stage label is present AND future-stage labels are absent.","scope":"kody pipeline labels"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Complexity labels (kody:low/medium/high) persist across all pipeline stages and must be asserted as always-present throughout.","scope":"kody pipeline labels"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The test reads current stage from status.json, not from the labels themselves — status.json is the source of truth for which stage label should be active.","scope":"kody pipeline testing"}]}
